title: musa lutea
intro: Musa lutea, also known as the yellow banana passionflower, is a type of flowering plant in the passionflower family. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, helping to reduce pain and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Musa lutea include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as improved digestion and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of Musa lutea can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
